overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza and elevated walkways, featuring towering skyscrapers with neon signage, holographic fish advertisements floating in the air, and pedestrians with umbrellas. The scene is set in a dense urban environment with wet reflective surfaces, likely from the game Cyberpunk 2077, with heavy fog and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic displays and reflective wet pavement

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the Militech tower signage
camera tilts back down to eye level and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: standing in the plaza observing the towering Militech building and holographic fish before starting to walk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair walking past the camera from right to left

large glowing orange and white koi fish hologram swimming in mid-air
translucent blue glowing fish hologram projected on building facade
wet reflective pavement showing neon reflections and embedded light strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic cyberpunk plaza with wet reflective ground. A large orange holographic fish swims on the right while the camera pans up to reveal the imposing Militech tower looming overhead through the fog. A pedestrian with red hair passes by as the camera tilts back down.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated curved pedestrian walkway with glass railings

events.description: passing by a small tree in a planter on the left side of the walkway
large blue holographic fish swims overhead on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway, passing other pedestrians while observing the holographic displays

entered.detail: curved pedestrian bridge with illuminated glass railings and embedded floor lighting
small green tree in a rectangular planter box on the walkway edge
tall building facade covered in bright digital advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated curved walkway with glass railings, passing a small tree on the left. The blue holographic fish swims alongside on the left, while digital billboards cover the buildings on the right. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered section of elevated walkway with overhead concrete structure

events.description: entering covered section of walkway with overhead roof structure
exiting covered walkway into open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered walkway section, passing pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding white umbrella walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: curved white concrete ceiling and support structure covering the walkway
massive building with orange and gold illuminated facade and complex architectural details

segments.scene_description: The walkway enters a covered section with a curved white overhead structure, sheltering from the weather. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk ahead. The scene transitions back to open air as the walkway curves, revealing a large orange-lit skyscraper ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with stairs, grassy park area, and vending terminals

events.description: camera looks up at the towering orange skyscraper and surrounding buildings
entering grassy landscaped area with trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, looking up at the architecture, then moving toward the grassy park area with trees

notable_agents.action: woman in black outfit walking while looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: concrete stairs with yellow edges leading down to a lower level
landscaped area with green grass, trees, and benches
red automated kiosk or vending machine with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open plaza with wet pavement, passing stairs on the right. The camera looks up at the towering orange skyscraper before continuing toward a grassy park area with trees and benches. Pedestrians walk in various directions, and a red vending terminal stands near the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk district, moving from a foggy plaza into a sheltered walkway and finally toward a bright urban park. It begins on wet, reflective pavement where a large orange holographic fish swims past as the camera pans up to reveal the imposing Militech tower looming through the haze. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts onto an elevated curved walkway with glass railings, passing a blue holographic fish and digital billboards before entering a white covered structure where pedestrians carry umbrellas. The walkway then curves back into the open air, revealing a towering orange-lit skyscraper that dominates the skyline. Finally, the camera descends back into an open plaza, passing a red vending terminal and stairs before gliding toward a grassy park area with trees and benches.
